rule_text: ELIGIBILITY of Bidders: NATIONALITY shall be in accordance with ITB 4.4 — must be MET by both Single Entity and JV Lead/Other members. Documentation: Form ELI-1.1 and ELI-1.2 with attachments.
verification_method: PASS if Form ELI-1.1 + ELI-1.2 are attached for each bidder/JV member. FAIL on missing nationality declaration.

rule_text: CONFLICT OF INTEREST: NO conflicts of interest in accordance with ITB 4.2 SHALL exist. The Bidder shall declare no COI in the Letter of Bid — applicable to Single Entity, JV Lead and Other members.
verification_method: PASS if Letter of Bid contains COI declaration. FAIL on missing or conditional COI declaration.

rule_text: ELIGIBILITY: The Bidder MUST NOT have been DECLARED INELIGIBLE by the Authority per ITB 4.5 — applicable to Single Entity, JV Lead and Other members. Declaration in Letter of Bid.
verification_method: PASS if Authority's debarment list checked against bidder. FAIL if bidder appears on Authority's blacklist/debarment list.

rule_text: The bidder SHALL FURNISH the GST REGISTRATION CERTIFICATE issued by the GOVERNMENT OF ANDHRA PRADESH along with the tender.
verification_method: PASS if AP-state GST certificate uploaded with bid. FAIL on out-of-state GSTIN or missing certificate.

rule_text: Form PER-2 (Resume and Declaration) is REQUIRED for EACH KEY PERSONNEL listed in the bid — including PERSONAL information (Name, DOB, Address, Email), PROFESSIONAL/ACADEMIC qualifications, LANGUAGE PROFICIENCY (speaking/reading/writing levels), and EMPLOYMENT details (Authority address/phone, contact, fax, job title, years with employer).
verification_method: PASS if every named key personnel has a complete PER-2 form. FAIL on missing fields or unsigned declaration.
